editorial.heading: Document photos, prepared with the patience of a real studio
paragraphs: A passport photograph is a small image, but the details matter. The face should be clearly visible, the head centered, the eyes open, the expression natural, and the background plain enough to avoid rejection or repeated submissions.

At Sahu Studio in Karkardooma, East Delhi, we prepare passport and visa photos for clients from Anand Vihar, Central Delhi, Noida, and nearby Delhi NCR areas. The process is simple: we confirm the requirement, photograph with controlled light, prepare the crop, and provide print or digital files as needed.

For Indian passport-style presentation, many clients ask for a 35 x 45 mm / 3.5 x 4.5 cm format. Exact requirements can vary by application flow, form, or online portal, so we always recommend checking the latest instruction before final submission.

faqs.question: What passport photo size do you prepare?
faqs.answer: We commonly prepare passport photos in a practical 35 x 45 mm / 3.5 x 4.5 cm presentation. Exact size requirements can vary by application flow, form, or portal, so please confirm the latest instruction before final submission.

faqs.question: What makes a good Indian passport photo?
faqs.answer: A recent color photo with a plain white background, full front view, centered head, eyes open, natural expression, and no distracting shadows is usually expected. The print should be clear and continuous-tone.

faqs.question: Do you provide digital copies?
faqs.answer: Yes. We can provide digital JPEG copies when needed for online forms, portals, or email submission.

faqs.question: Can I send my passport photo on WhatsApp?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can share your existing image on WhatsApp, and the studio can help prepare the correct crop, background cleanup, print sheet, and digital file depending on your requirement.

faqs.question: Can you support visa photo requirements?
faqs.answer: Yes. Visa photo requirements vary by country and embassy. Share the exact requirement with us and we will prepare the photo accordingly.

faqs.question: Do you offer passport photo delivery in Delhi NCR?
faqs.answer: Printed passport photographs can be collected from the studio, and local delivery may be arranged across parts of Delhi NCR depending on timing and availability.

faqs.question: Can passport photos be prepared the same day?
faqs.answer: Most standard passport and document photo requests can usually be prepared the same day, depending on quantity, timing, and delivery requirements.

faqs.question: Do you edit the background?
faqs.answer: Yes. We can clean and prepare a plain white background for document use while keeping the face natural and professional.

testimonials.author: Rohan Malhotra
testimonials.text: Shared my photo on WhatsApp in the morning for a Schengen visa photo. Sahu Studio cleaned up the background, adjusted it to exact specs, and sent the prints to my office in Noida through a local delivery partner the same afternoon.

testimonials.author: Deepika K.
testimonials.text: Needed urgent passport photos for a last-minute submission. Visited their Karkardooma studio late in the evening. They were extremely helpful, prepared the prints immediately, and emailed the digital JPEG right away.

testimonials.author: Arjun Mehta
testimonials.text: Sent a casual photo via WhatsApp to see if it could be used for a visa form. They did an excellent background cleanup, cropped it to the exact passport dimensions, and shared a high-res digital copy that got approved in the portal instantly.

testimonials.author: Priya Chawla
testimonials.text: Getting passport photos of an infant is so stressful, but the team at their East Delhi studio was incredibly patient. They took multiple shots until they got the perfect one and quickly shared both the printed sheet and digital file.
